message:
fcp-mesh: add fcp-policy path dependency

Wires fcp-policy into fcp-mesh's Cargo.toml so the crate can import
policy reason codes directly rather than going through fcp-core re-
exports.  Cargo.lock also picks up fcp-evidence as an indirect dep of
fcp-mesh through fcp-policy's transitive graph — both changes are
reflected in the lockfile and there are no version bumps to any other
dependency.

This is infrastructure for the recent owner-crate routing work ("Route
SDK and testkit through FCP3 owner crates", "Use fcp-policy for policy
reason codes in mesh transport"): fcp-mesh source that now references
fcp-policy types needs the workspace entry so those uses compile as
direct rather than relying on whatever the parent pulled in.
